title: tigridia albicans
intro: Tigridia albicans, also known as the Mexican tiger flower or tiger flower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae. The medicinal properties of Tigridia albicans lie in its tuber, which contains saponins, flavonoids, and phenolic compounds that exhibit anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use as a natural remedy for digestive problems and skin conditions. Tigridia albicans can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal properties, and it is also used in traditional medicine in some parts of Mexico and Central America.
